lines.english: Maajh, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਿਰੁ ਸੁਹਾਗੁ ਵਰੁ ਅਗਮੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਸਾਧਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੪॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: thir suhaag var agam agochar jan naanak prem saadhaaree jeeo |4|4|11|
lines.english: Her marriage is eternal; her Husband is Inaccessible and Incomprehensible. O Servant Nanak, His Love is her only Support. ||4||4||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਗੁਣੁ ਸਰਗੁਣੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮੇਰਾ ਕੋਈ ਹੈ ਜੀਉ ਆਣਿ ਮਿਲਾਵੈ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: niragun saragun har har meraa koee hai jeeo aan milaavai jeeo |1|
lines.english: My Lord, Har, Har, is both absolute and related, unmanifest and manifest; is there anyone who can come and unite me with Him? ||1||
I have searched and searched, seeking the Blessed Vision of His Darshan.
I travelled through all sorts of woods and forests.
they perform worship services, wear ceremonial religious marks on their foreheads, and take ritual cleansing baths at sacred shrines of pilgrimage.
People recite from memory the wisdom of the six schools of philosophy;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਵਲੀ ਕਰਮ ਆਸਨ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਇਨ ਮਹਿ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: nivalee karam aasan chauraaseeh in meh saant na aavai jeeo |2|
lines.english: They perform the inner cleansing practice with water and adopt the eighty-four Yogic postures; but still, they find no peace in any of these. ||2||
They chant and meditate, practicing austere self-discipline for years and years;
they wander on journeys all over the earth;

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਜੋਗੀ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਉਠਿ ਧਾਵੈ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: eik khin hiradai saant na aavai jogee bahurr bahurr utth dhaavai jeeo |3|
lines.english: and yet, their hearts are not at peace, even for an instant. The Yogi rises up and goes out, over and over again. ||3||
My mind and body have been cooled and soothed; I have been blessed with patience and composure.
By His Mercy, I have met the Holy Saint.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਬਸਿਆ ਘਟ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਗਲੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਗਾਵੈ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੫॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: prabh abinaasee basiaa ghatt bheetar har mangal naanak gaavai jeeo |4|5|12|
lines.english: The Immortal Lord God has come to dwell within my heart. Nanak sings the songs of joy to the Lord. ||4||5||12||
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:
The Supreme Lord God is Infinite and Divine;
He is Inaccessible, Incomprehensible, Invisible and Inscrutable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਗੋਬਿੰਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਾਤੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: deen deaal gopaal gobindaa har dhiaavahu guramukh gaatee jeeo |1|
lines.english: Merciful to the meek, Sustainer of the World, Lord of the Universe-meditating on the Lord, the Gurmukhs find salvation. ||1||
The Gurmukhs are emancipated by the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆਲ ਦਮੋਦਰੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਹੋਰਤੁ ਕਿਤੈ ਨ ਭਾਤੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: deaal damodar guramukh paaeeai horat kitai na bhaatee jeeo |2|
lines.english: The Gurmukh finds the Merciful Lord. He is not found any other way. ||2||
The Lord Krishna becomes the Gurmukh's Companion.
He does not need to eat; His Hair is Wondrous and Beautiful; He is free of hate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਜਨਾ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਪੂਜਹਿ ਪੈਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: kott janaa jaa ke poojeh pairaa |
lines.english: Millions of people worship His Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੋਈ ਭਗਤੁ ਇਕਾਤੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh hiradai jaa kai har har soee bhagat ikaatee jeeo |3|
lines.english: He alone is a devotee, who becomes Gurmukh, whose heart is filled with the Lord, Har, Har. ||3||
Forever fruitful is the Blessed Vision of His Darshan; He is Infinite and Incomparable.
He is Awesome and All-powerful; He is forever the Great Giver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੀਐ ਤਿਤੁ ਤਰੀਐ ਗਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਵਿਰਲੀ ਜਾਤੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੬॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam japeeai tith tareeai gat naanak viralee jaatee jeeo |4|6|13|
lines.english: As Gurmukh, chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and you shall be carried across. O Nanak, rare are those who know this state! ||4||6||13||
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:
You are the Pride of the meek and the poor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਕਿਛੁ ਤੂੰਹੈ ਤੂੰਹੈ ਮੇਰੇ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਤੇਰੀ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕਉ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh toonhai toonhai mere piaare teree kudarat kau bal jaaee jeeo |1|
lines.english: You are everything; You are my Beloved. I am a sacrifice to Your Creative Power. ||1||
As You command, I obey; as You give, I receive.
By Your Will, we wander in the wilderness; by Your Will, we find the path.
By Your Will, we become Gurmukh and sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਕੋ ਮੂਰਖੁ ਨਾ ਕੋ ਸਿਆਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: naa ko moorakh naa ko siaanaa |
lines.english: No one is foolish, and no one is clever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਣੈ ਭਰਮਿ ਭਵੈ ਬਹੁ ਜੂਨੀ ਸਭ ਕਿਛੁ ਤਿਸੈ ਰਜਾਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bhaanai bharam bhavai bahu joonee sabh kichh tisai rajaaee jeeo |2|
lines.english: By Your Will, we wander in doubt through countless lifetimes. Everything happens by Your Will. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਅਗੋਚਰ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਅਥਾਹਾ ਤੇਰੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: agam agochar beant athaahaa teree keemat kehan na jaaee jeeo |3|
lines.english: You are Inaccessible, Incomprehensible, Infinite and Unfathomable. Your Value cannot be expressed. ||3||
Your Will determines everything;
I have come and fallen at Your Door, O Lord.
Please bless me with the dust of the Saints, O my Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਸਨੁ ਪੇਖਤ ਮਨੁ ਆਘਾਵੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਿਲਣੁ ਸੁਭਾਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੭॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: darasan pekhat man aaghaavai naanak milan subhaaee jeeo |4|7|14|
lines.english: Gazing upon the Blessed Vision of His Darshan, my mind is fulfilled. O Nanak, with natural ease, I merge into Him. ||4||7||14||
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:
Afflicted with hunger, they run around in all directions.
They forget the Lord, and they suffer in pain.
My True Guru is absolutely All-powerful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਹੇਲਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਦੇਵੈ ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: simarat naam sadaa suhelaa jis devai deen deaalaa jeeo |1|
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on the Naam, they are happy forever. The Lord, Merciful to the meek, bestows it upon them. ||1||
